forecast caps — no commercial differentiation signal yet
(revisit if AI-grounded forecasting becomes a distinct premium
tier).

cross-module review (Position B: phone-mobile interpretation).
Approvers/owner-managers in SG SMEs approve invoices, AP runs, and
expense claims while travelling — daily mobile activity. Parity with
hr.mobile_access (promoted 2026-05-14). Step 15 baseline demote is
overridden here because for SG SME finance buyers, mobile access is a
universal expectation. IMDA: 3-in-1 ERP + Acct Mgmt sol cats Q1
"Cloud and Multi-Device Accessibility" mandatory.
Solution evidence (cheapest plan in_base): Odoo, ERPNext, Sage 300,

module_sme_rollup.name: Core Accounting & Records
module_sme_rollup.description: Foundational ledger, invoicing, and transaction recording capabilities

statements.text: Configure chart of accounts with account types, dimensions, and post balanced journal entries with supporting documentation.
Create and manage sales invoices with tax, discounts, and auto-generate from orders; process customer payments and credit notes flexibly.
Capture vendor bills via manual entry or OCR; match to POs and receipts; route through multi-level approval workflows.
Reconcile bank accounts and sub-ledgers to general ledger; import bank statements in standard formats and match transactions automatically.
Set opening balances, control period and year-end close cycles, and lock periods to prevent unauthorized changes.

module_sme_rollup.name: Tax & Compliance
module_sme_rollup.description: Tax calculation, reporting, and regulatory filing automation

statements.text: Configure tax codes with rates and types; automatically calculate tax on sales and purchases; track input and output tax separately.
statements.rationale: Accurate tax compliance and audit readiness

statements.text: Generate periodic tax returns in required format and submit to revenue authority via API integration.
Map general ledger accounts to XBRL taxonomy; validate and generate XBRL instance documents for ACRA submission.
Generate tax audit report with full calculation transparency and supporting transaction detail.
Support e-invoicing via PEPPOL BIS 3.0 format; track transmission status and auto-create vendor bills from received invoices.

module_sme_rollup.name: Financial Reporting & Analysis
module_sme_rollup.description: Statements, dashboards, and business intelligence for decision-making

statements.text: Generate profit and loss, balance sheet, trial balance, and cash flow statements with comparative and budget-versus-actual analysis.
Drill down from financial statement lines to underlying general ledger transactions and supporting detail.
Generate ageing reports for receivables and payables by customer and vendor; calculate DSO and DPO metrics.
Display pre-built dashboards for CFO, controller, and clerk roles with KPIs, drill-down, and mobile access.
Generate rolling 13-week and 12-month cashflow forecasts from receivables, payables, and payroll schedules.
Export financial statements to PDF, Excel, and CSV; support consolidated and per-entity views for multi-entity operations.

module_sme_rollup.name: Working Capital & Collections
module_sme_rollup.description: Receivables, payables, and cash management optimization

statements.text: Set customer credit limits and monitor real-time exposure; assign credit scores and risk categories.
Execute automated dunning sequences via email, SMS, and letter by ageing; track payment promises and follow-ups.
Configure recurring invoices for subscriptions and periodic billing; send invoices electronically via email with PDF.
Schedule and execute payment runs based on due dates and priority; generate batch payment files for bank transmission.
Calculate and apply early-payment discounts automatically; process vendor credit notes and debit memos.
Accept credit card, PayNow, FAST, GIRO, and digital wallet payments; automatically match and reconcile settlements.

module_sme_rollup.name: Period Close & Controls
module_sme_rollup.description: Close procedures, accruals, and financial controls enforcement

statements.text: Manage period-close tasks with assignment, ownership, and completion tracking; progress from soft to hard close.
Create and reuse accrual and prepayment templates; reconcile sub-ledgers with variance reporting and approval.
Calculate and post fixed-asset depreciation automatically; revalue foreign exchange balances and post gain/loss entries.
Record immutable audit trail of who, when, and what for every transaction and field change.
Enforce multi-level approval workflows by amount, account, and type; detect and prevent segregation-of-duties conflicts.
Lock periods to prevent unauthorized changes; log all period reopenings and user activity with timestamps.

module_sme_rollup.name: Integration & Infrastructure
module_sme_rollup.description: Data connectivity, security, and system interoperability

statements.text: Import master data and opening balances from CSV or Excel; export reports to CSV, Excel, and PDF formats.
Integrate with payroll, CRM, inventory, POS, and bank feed systems; provide REST API for custom integrations.
Encrypt financial data at rest and in transit; log all record-level data access with user identity and timestamp.
Create and manage user accounts with unique credentials; implement role-based access control and two-factor authentication.
Extract and validate invoice data from multiple document formats automatically with 95% or higher accuracy.
Detect anomalies in journal entries, expenses, and payroll; automatically reconcile bank statements and flag discrepancies.

Platform & Data.narrative: This family ensures your finance system is accessible, secure, and connected to the rest of your business. Singapore SMEs must comply with PDPA data protection rules and need staff to access financial data safely from anywhere—especially in hybrid work environments. It matters when your accountant needs to approve an invoice from a client site, or when you're integrating bank feeds to reconcile cash daily.

Core Ledger & Close.narrative: This is the financial backbone—it records every transaction in double-entry format, generates your statutory accounts, and tracks fixed assets and depreciation. Every Singapore SME must produce audited or reviewed financial statements for tax and stakeholder reporting, and you need an immutable audit trail to satisfy ACRA and your auditors. It matters when you're closing the books monthly or preparing for year-end audit.

Revenue Cycle.narrative: This family handles customer invoicing, payment collection, and credit management—the lifeblood of cash flow. Singapore SMEs need to issue e-invoices via InvoiceNow, accept online payments, and track who owes you money and when. It matters when you're chasing overdue invoices to improve cash flow, or when a customer disputes an invoice and you need to issue a credit note quickly.

Expense Cycle.narrative: This family captures supplier bills, employee expenses, and purchase orders, then routes them for approval and payment. SMEs need to control spending, match invoices to orders, and integrate payroll costs into the ledger. It matters when you're managing a tight cash position and need to see all committed spend, or when staff submit expense claims and you need to reimburse them fairly and on time.

Treasury & Compliance.narrative: This family manages your bank accounts, cash forecasting, tax compliance (GST, income tax), and multi-currency transactions. Singapore SMEs must file GST returns on time and reconcile bank statements monthly; if you trade internationally, you need FX conversion and reporting. It matters when you're forecasting cash to avoid overdrafts, or when GST is due and you need to generate the F5 return in minutes, not days.

Planning & Analytics.narrative: This family lets you build budgets, compare actual spending to plan, and visualize financial health through dashboards and KPIs. SMEs use budgets to control costs and forecast growth; dashboards help the owner and CFO spot problems early. It matters when you're planning next year's hiring and need to model the P&L impact, or when you want to see which projects are profitable at a glance.
